summary: Tested 4 new onboarding screens (Splash1, Splash2, Onboarding, GoogleOAuth) plus navigation flow. SplashScreen1, SplashScreen2, GoogleOAuthScreen, and HomeScreen work perfectly. CRITICAL BUG: OnboardingScreen FlatList not rendering slide content in web preview - slides are invisible, navigation broken.

integration_issues.issue: FlatList slides not rendering content in web preview. All 3 slides are rendered in a single 5760px wide container instead of 3 separate 375px containers. Slide content (emoji circles, titles, descriptions) is not visible. Next button doesn't advance slides. Button text never changes from 'Next' to 'Get Started'. Navigation to google-oauth doesn't work.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native FlatList horizontal pagination not working in web preview. FlatList renders all items in single wide container (5760px) instead of separate paginated containers (3x 375px). scrollToIndex and scrollToOffset methods don't trigger proper scroll or state updates. This is a known React Native Web limitation with FlatList horizontal pagination.

test_report_links: Playwright UI tests executed via browser automation
Debug screenshots: /tmp/onboarding_v2_slide1.png through /tmp/onboarding_v2_slide3.png showing identical purple backgrounds
action_items: CRITICAL: Replace FlatList in onboarding.tsx with web-compatible pagination solution. Options: (1) Use ScrollView with manual page tracking, (2) Use react-native-web-swiper library, (3) Use conditional rendering with state-based slide switching, (4) Use Animated.View with manual scroll handling
After fixing FlatList, verify: slide content renders, Next button advances slides, button text changes to 'Get Started' on slide 3, navigation to /google-oauth works
Optional: Update expo-linear-gradient from 55.0.13 to ~15.0.8 and react-native-svg from 15.15.4 to 15.12.1 (currently working but shows warnings)

SplashScreen2 (splash2.tsx): Ring animation, Skip button work perfectly. Auto-navigation to onboarding works ✓
OnboardingScreen (onboarding.tsx): FlatList horizontal pagination broken in web preview. Slide content not visible. Navigation logic correct but FlatList doesn't scroll ❌
GoogleOAuthScreen (google-oauth.tsx): Perfect rendering and functionality. Both sign-in buttons navigate to home correctly. Terms/Privacy links work ✓
HomeScreen (home.tsx): All sections render correctly (tested in iteration 1) ✓
All testID attributes present and correct ✓
Issue is React Native Web FlatList limitation, not code logic error
updated_files: /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx (attempted fixes: updated handleNext, handleSkip, changed scrollToIndex to scrollToOffset, added onScroll listener - fixes didn't resolve FlatList rendering issue)

seed_data_creation: N/A - UI-only app with hardcoded content
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a UI-only Expo/React Native wellness app with onboarding flow. Splash screens and GoogleOAuth screen work perfectly. CRITICAL BUG: OnboardingScreen FlatList doesn't render slide content in web preview due to React Native Web limitation. The FlatList creates a single 5760px wide container instead of 3 paginated 375px slides. Slide content (emoji, title, text) is not visible, Next button doesn't work, navigation to google-oauth fails. Main agent needs to replace FlatList with web-compatible solution (ScrollView, carousel library, or conditional rendering). After fix, retest: slide content visibility, Next button navigation, button text change to 'Get Started', and navigation to /google-oauth.
rca_of_issue: Root Cause: React Native FlatList horizontal pagination is not fully compatible with React Native Web. When rendering horizontal FlatList with pagingEnabled in web preview, all items are rendered in a single wide container (width = numItems * itemWidth) instead of separate paginated containers. This causes: (1) Slide content positioned outside visible viewport, (2) scrollToIndex/scrollToOffset methods don't trigger proper scroll, (3) onScroll events don't fire correctly, (4) currentIndex state doesn't update. Reproduction: Navigate to /onboarding, observe purple background only, click Next button 3 times, observe no visual change and no navigation. Mitigation: Replace FlatList with ScrollView + manual pagination, or use web-compatible carousel library, or use conditional rendering with state-based slide switching.
